reason: Phase 0 requirements, 5 locked decisions (D1-D5), MVP scope (M1-M5), and 8 acceptance criteria.
Module breakdown, SQLite schema final form, EPA basis algorithm, consistency rules, rollback shape.
Ordered 7-step execution checklist with per-step validation commands, review gates, and rollback points.
Verbatim VCPToolBox SQLite schema, position encoding rules, vector BLOB format, and the schema deviations TagMemoRAG must adopt (manual_tags naming, kb_name discriminator, embedding_dim guard).
Source EPA pipeline (KMeans + weighted Power Iteration), why we substitute sklearn primitives, basisLabels strategy, cold-start identity matrix, and concrete training script outline.
epa_basis.npz field layout, fcntl.flock + atomic-write pattern, race scenarios, save/load pseudo-code that implementation must follow.
Existing manual_registry SQLite contracts and migration conventions — Phase 0 adds three tables to the same DB and must follow these patterns.
ServiceError code conventions for new errors (EmbeddingDimMismatchError, EpaTrainError) and tag_governance/manual delete failure shape.
Test layering, dependency rules, and verification expectations — implement.md's Step 7 regression bar is bound by this.
Low-cardinality operational fields for new RebuildTask fields (epa_basis_train_kind, tag_embeddings_added/skipped/failed, orphan_tags_removed).
Where to place new modules (tag_store.py, tag_embedder.py, epa_basis.py, epa_projector.py) and data assets (data/_global/).
Phase 0 spans manual_registry / incremental_rebuild / tag_governance / api / cli / observability — cross-layer consistency must follow this guide.
Tag store and tag embedder must reuse existing Embedder, SQLite connection, and registry transactions instead of duplicating patterns.
